statusTrace:
page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/'>

    def test_verify_add_item_to_cart_from_side_menu(page: Page):
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Test Data
        # ==========================================================
    
        base_url = "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
    
        username = "CSASINHN"
        password = "GOLD950"
    
        customer_name = "smith"
    
        product_id = "721731"
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 1 : Launch Application
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.goto(base_url)
    
        expect(page).to_have_url(
            re.compile(r".*/auth/login")
        )
    
        print("✓ Login page loaded.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 2 : Login
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        ).fill(username)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        ).fill(password)
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role("main")
        ).to_be_visible()
    
        print("✓ Login successful.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 3 : Create Order
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role("complementary").get_by_role("button", name="Create Order").click()
    
        print("✓ Create Order opened.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 4 : Search Customer
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select Contact"
        ).click()
    
        search_customer = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Enter ID, name, email, phone"
        )
    
        search_customer.fill(customer_name)
    
        customer = page.locator(
            "div"
        ).filter(
            has_text=re.compile(
                r"SMITHS CORNER.*Customer ID:"
            )
        ).first
    
        expect(customer).to_be_visible()
    
        customer.click()
    
        print("✓ Customer selected.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 5 : Attach Contact
        # ==========================================================
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Select contact",
            exact=True
        ).click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Greg Smith"
        ).first.click()
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Attach"
        ).click()
    
        print("✓ Contact attached.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 6 : Search Product
        # ==========================================================
    
        product_search = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Search Product"
        )
    
        expect(product_search).to_be_visible()
    
        product_search.fill(product_id)
    
        print(f"✓ Product searched : {product_id}")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 7 : Add Product to Cart
        # ==========================================================
    
        add_to_cart = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Add to Cart"
        )
    
        expect(add_to_cart).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(add_to_cart).to_be_enabled()
    
        add_to_cart.click()
    
        page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    
        print("✓ Product added to cart.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 8 : Validate Cart
        # ==========================================================
    
        added_item = page.get_by_text(
            f"Item # {product_id}"
        )
    
        expect(added_item).to_be_visible()
    
        print(f"✓ Item #{product_id} displayed in cart.")
    
        # ==========================================================
        # STEP 9 : Validate Order Summary
        # ==========================================================
    
        expect(
            page.get_by_role(
                "button",
                name="Order Summary"
            )
>       ).to_be_visible()
